questions: Who should this campaign reach — prospects who don't yet use Northbridge, existing customers, or both? The messaging and channels will differ significantly.
What's the business outcome you're looking for — lead generation, product adoption among current customers, upsell/expansion, or something else? This shapes the key message.

Which new integrations are we promoting, and what's the ONE thing you want your audience to understand about them (e.g., 'they save time,' 'they unlock new workflows,' 'they're now available')? This becomes our key message.
